scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run fix-paths && npx gh-pages -d out
scripts.fix-paths: cd out && sed -i 's|src="/images/|src="/landing.github.io/images/|g' index.html && sed -i 's|href="/images/|href="/landing.github.io/images/|g' index.html && sed -i 's|src="/logo.svg|src="/landing.github.io/logo.svg|g' index.html && sed -i 's|href="/logo.svg|href="/landing.github.io/logo.svg|g' index.html
